---
title: "KAIST IAM Group"
title-block-style: none
page-layout: full
toc: false
format:
  html:
    theme: flatly
    css: styles-home.css
resources:
- img/
execute:
  enabled: false
listing:
  - id: latest-news
    contents: posts_news
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [image, title, date]
    max-items: 2
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 1

  - id: latest-pubs
    contents: posts_publications
    sort: "date desc"
    fields: [image, title, date]
    max-items: 2
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 1
---

::: {=html}
<!-- =========================
     HERO SLIDER
========================== -->
<section class="hero-slider" aria-label="KAIST IAM Group highlights">
  <div class="slides">

    <article class="slide is-active" style="background-image:url('img/kaist.jpg')"></article>
    <article class="slide" style="background-image:url('img/slide2.png')"></article>
    <article class="slide" style="background-image:url('img/kaist2.jpg')"></article>

  </div>

  <!-- один общий оверлей с текстом -->
  <div class="slide-overlay"></div>

  <div class="slide-content">
  <p class="slide-kicker">WELCOME TO THE</p>
    <h1 class="slide-title">KAIST IAM Group</h1>
    <p class="slide-lead">
      We develop and apply Integrated Assessment Models (IAMs) to explore realistic net-zero pathways
      and translate model insights into decision-ready evidence.
    </p>
    <div class="slide-actions">
      <a class="btn btn-primary" href="models.qmd">Explore research</a>
    </div>
  </div>

  <button class="slide-btn prev" type="button" aria-label="Previous slide">‹</button>
  <button class="slide-btn next" type="button" aria-label="Next slide">›</button>
  <div class="slide-dots" aria-label="Slide navigation"></div>
</section>
:::

::: {=html}
<!-- =========================
     WHAT WE DO
========================== -->
<section class="section">
  <h2>What we do</h2>
  <p class="section-description">
    The <strong>KAIST IAM Group</strong> develops and applies <strong>Integrated Assessment Models (IAMs)</strong>
    to explore realistic net-zero pathways. Our work combines <strong>environmental science</strong>,
    <strong>energy systems engineering</strong>, <strong>economics</strong>, and <strong>public policy</strong> 
    to simulate scenarios &amp; strategies for climate-resilient development.
  </p>

  <div class="cards-row">
    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-icon">🧩</div>
      <h3>Model building</h3>
      <p>Advancing IAMs and energy-system modules tailored to Korea and global contexts.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-icon">📊</div>
      <h3>Policy analysis</h3>
      <p>Evaluating mitigation options, technology deployment, and just transition routes.</p>
    </div>

    <div class="card">
      <div class="card-icon">🤝</div>
      <h3>Open collaboration</h3>
      <p>Working with universities, institutes, and government to co-produce actionable insights.</p>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>
:::

::: {.section .section-muted}
## Latest updates

::: {.two-col-updates}

::: {.updates-col}
::: {.section-subhead}
### News
[See all →](news.qmd){.link-more}
:::

::: {#latest-news}
:::
:::

::: {.updates-col}
::: {.section-subhead}
### Recent publications
[Full list →](publications.qmd){.link-more}
:::

::: {#latest-pubs}
:::
:::

:::
:::


::: {=html}
<!-- =========================
     JOIN THE LAB
========================== -->
<section class="section section-accent"><div class="join-wrapper"><div class="join-main"><h2>Join the lab</h2><p>We are recruiting <strong>Ph.D.</strong> and <strong>Master's</strong> students passionate about climate, energy, and modeling.</p><ul class="bullets"><li>Engineering, economics, environmental backgrounds welcome</li><li>Skills in data analysis, simulation, or coding (<strong>R</strong>, <strong>Python</strong>)</li><li>No IAM experience required</li></ul><div class="cta-row"><a class="btn btn-primary" href="opportunities.qmd">See opportunities</a><a class="btn btn-outline" href="mailto:hmcjeon@kaist.ac.kr">Send your CV</a></div></div><div class="box-note"><div class="mascot-animation"><img src="https://giving.kaist.ac.kr/nubzuki/KAIST-hi.gif" alt="KAIST mascot waving"></div><p class="note-title">Why KAIST IAM Group?</p><p>Join a vibrant international team at KAIST, working at the interface of cutting-edge modeling and real-world climate and energy policy.</p></div></div></section>
:::
::: {=html}
<!-- =========================
     CONTACTS
========================== -->
<section class="section" id="contact"><h2>Connect with us</h2><p><strong>KAIST Main Campus</strong><br>291 Daehak-ro, Yuseong-gu, Daejeon, Republic of Korea</p><div class="chips contact-links">
    <a class="chip" href="https://www.linkedin.com/company/kaist-iam-group/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      🔗 LinkedIn
    </a>
    <a class="chip" href="https://github.com/GCAM-KAIST" target="_blank" rel="noopener">
      💻 GitHub
    </a>
    <a class="chip" href="mailto:hmcjeon@kaist.ac.kr">
      ✉️ Email
    </a>
  </div>
</section>
:::
